name: swirl-search
description: AI Search & RAG Without Moving Your Data. Get instant answers from your company's knowledge across 100+ apps while keeping data secure. Deploy in minutes, not months.
summaryZh: AI Search & RAG Without Moving Your Data. Get instant answers from your company's knowledge across 100+ apps while keeping data secure. Deploy in minutes, not months. 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。
